description: A detailed drawing for a steel structure is complete and needs to be sent to a fabrication shop.

nodes.task_description: Verify the drawing has been fully approved and is at the 'Issued for Construction' revision.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the drawing is ready for fabrication.

nodes.task_description: Create a transmittal to the selected fabrication shop.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent initiates a new transmittal record.

nodes.task_description: Attach the drawing and any relevant specifications to the transmittal and issue it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the complete fabrication package to the vendor.
